cityu.name_en: Hotel Ease Access · Lai Chi Kok

cityu.name: The Cityview · 城景国际

cityu.name: Royal Plaza Hotel · 帝京酒店

polyu.name: Hotel ICON · 唯港荟

polyu.name: Harbour Plaza Metropolis · 都会海逸酒店
